programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

Young Calvin's unemployment has gotten everyone at '227' so concerned that 'always-involved' Mary badgers husband Lester into hiring him--but when Lester is forced to fire the awkward teenager, the residents explode.

After Mary's refrigerator breaks down, her sly and opportunistic neighbor Sandra readily agrees to use her 'influence' on their stingy landlord to get her a new one--in exchange for Mary lending her apartment to Sandra for one of her 'small gatherings.'

Mary Jenkins, the irrepressible meddler and protector of '227' gives honesty a beating after she backs into a neighbor's parked car and then calls upon her 'man-wise' nemesis Sandra to use her feminine wiles to calm the handsome man's anger.
Mary fires Cupid's arrow at her brother Lewis and best friend Rose, but she misses the mark when Lewis sets his own sights on resident vamp Sandra.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew helps Walt raise funds at a casino, Alex explores his legal options, Sky travels to Miami to look after her shop, and Ted and Tatiana's relationship hits a roadblock.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Donna teams up with Ceaser's enemy to take him down, the crew bets big to help Walt, and Sky's son Des meets his biological father, despite his mom's initial disapproval.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew throws a going-away party for Mama Bae, Alex moves into Donna's place, Ceaser receives devastating news, and Sky hosts the grand opening of her shop in Miami.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky enlists the crew to help with her fashion show in L.A., Miss Kitty and Young Bae talk about their fight, Alex surprises Donna, and Tatiana reaches her breaking point.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser reunites with an enemy, Krystal has a much-needed talk with her father, and Sky's twerk fashion show includes a surprise that sends Ceaser over the edge.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Free jackets get in the way of Ceaser squashing his beef with Alex, Tokie refuses to accept peace between Tati and Krystal, and Sky plows ahead with Operation Mend Fences.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: After mending fences with Puma, Cease makes him a partner at 113th only to have his decision be questioned during his 40th birthday celebration. Bae struggles to keep her marriage together, while Sky confronts her son Des, about his recent behavior.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Walt brings his new girlfriend by the shop, which causes Donna to catch a flashback. Young Bae and Rob face difficulties in their marriage. Sky is at a crossroads with her relationship with Des.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Kit's mom passes away in D.C and the news rocks the shop. Donna and Walt duke it out over Jessica. Puma hires new girl London and Bae thinks he has a shady, ulterior motive.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Puma hires London to cover for Kitty which disrupts the precarious balance in the shop. Tati has a run in with the law and Donna faces a major financial setback. Puma tries to bring a little kumbaya to 113 but no good deed goes unpunished.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Chicago
programme.desc: When a romantic video of Ryan and Rachel vacationing in Mexico shows up on social media, a jilted Kitty bares her claws. Former Chicago Bull Eddy Curry gets a memorial tattoo. 2nd City Ink hosts an open call to expand the team.

programme.title: Pat Gray Unleashed
programme.desc: Pat Gray pulls no punches and restores common sense to a senseless world through biting analysis, unique insight and fun.

programme.title: Rufo & Lomez

programme.desc: The latest in culture, news, theology and politics from a Christian, conservative perspective.

programme.title: The Steve Deace Show
programme.desc: Principled conservatism with a snarky twist served up daily.

programme.title: Stu And Dave Do America

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Focusing on the intersection of politics and global business.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: On this week's Leaders with Francine Lacqua, she speaks with Honeywell Chief Executive Officer Vimal Kapur about his journey from entry-level engineer to leading one of the world's biggest industrial companies.

programme.title: Leaders with Francine Lacqua: The Podcast
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua speaks with tennis legend Rafael Nadal about the mindset that fueled his career; they explore how resilience, self-doubt and unwavering determination helped him overcome repeated injuries and become one of tennis's greatest champions.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Bringing global investors everything you need to know as the trading day begins in Asia; Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and David Ingles give global investors insight into the world's second-biggest economy, delivering in-depth discussions with newsmakers.

programme.title: Insight With Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: A spotlight on the fast-paced growth and major deals happening across the Middle East and Africa, linking the market drivers from overnight in the U.S. and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep-dive analysis of the top businesses.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: From London, essential morning viewing to stay ahead of the day's market trends with news stories from the U.S. and Asia in the lead-up to the opening of European markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Opening Trade
programme.desc: "The Opening Trade" explores things to know as markets open across Europe; analysis that isn't available anywhere else, a break-down of the biggest stories of the day and top guests who have skin in the game.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After someone breaks into Luis Delgado's (Lou Diamond Phillips) home and kills his wife, Luis and Danny team up to take down the vicious murderer who may also be responsible for Linda's death.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin must convince Frank to back a new state police bill as part of a bargain she made with Governor Mendez (David Zayas). Also, Danny and Baez pursue the same perp twice after the DA's office is unconvinced by their initial lineup.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: DNA evidence in a murder case leads Danny and Baez to identical twins with identical alibis. Also, Frank learns Nicky is interviewing for a job at the Justice Coalition, which he rarely sees eye-to-eye with.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: As Jamie and Eddie's wedding day approaches, Frank worries about the toast he'll deliver at their rehearsal dinner. Also, Erin interviews a witness whose story leads her to doubt Eddie's honesty.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Stargate Command is baffled by the arrival of several virtually identical SG-1 teams and must find a way to return them to their respective universes before calamity occurs. Ben Browder, Michael Shanks, Amanda Tapping, and Christopher Judge star.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny and Baez grapple with a year-old homicide investigation brought to their attention by Maggie (Callie Thorne), the medium who previously helped them solve a case.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank and Erin are at odds when Frank learns the D.A.'s office keeps a list of NYPD cops they consider "unreliable." Also, Danny and Baez recruit retired mobster Vincent Rella (Dan Hedaya) to assist in an investigation.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank's esteem for an old friend and late socialite proves to be a mistake when her son threatens to publicly reveal who she really was.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank takes one of Jamie's cases to heart when it involves the suspicious death of his friend's, FBI Agent Wilson Ortega's (Emiliano Diez), terminally ill wife.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank works to vindicate Detective Douglas McKenzie (Mike Carlsen), a detective accused of using excessive force. Also, Danny and Baez track down the killer responsible for the death of a rapper's bodyguard.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank is conflicted about how to deal with former cop Rick Austin's (Evan Arthur Hall) gripe about his pension. Also, Jamie helps a friend, Connor O'Brien (Brian Hutchison), deal with illicit pictures of his daughter on the internet.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie and Frank oppose each other's viewpoints over the public's treatment of cops after rowdy teens pour water on two rookies.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: While Henry works as an investigative consultant for child services, he and Danny butt heads over a case involving a man who is volatile toward his wife. Also, Frank is caught in the middle of an ongoing battle between the NYPD and the FDNY.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: While working a case of a nanny accused of abuse, Erin disagrees with the psychiatric consultant, Dr. Alice Dornan (Jennifer Bowles), regarding her diagnosis and punishment suggestion.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Joe and his friend Mitch go after a puma, Joe climbs a big peak and throws his gun up higher, intending to crawl up after it.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss relies on clever attorney Whitney Parker, who has a drinking problem, to clear him of a murder charge.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Two robberies take place on stagecoaches that Adam is traveling on, and both times a knight in shining armor scares the robbers away. Adam is accused of robbery, and his story about the knight is none too helpful.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss unknowingly enters a flapjack contest and Joe puts Hoss on a diet which Hoss doesn't care for. Joe's betting on the flapjack contest could get him into some trouble and will he ever succeed in getting the window pane his Pa wants?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Little Joe convinces Ben to hire Harry Starr, a half-Indian who is accused by other ranchers of being a chronic horse thief. Joe sets out to prove the others wrong, but is the youngest Cartwright's trust misplaced?

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A peaceful Indian is framed for the kidnapping of a young girl, a stunt which ends of tragedy.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: On their way to prevent a young woman from encountering the renegade Indians, Joe and Tuck are captured, and in order to save them all, Joe must fight Sharp Tongue, who is the leader of the band who went to school with Joe as a youth.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Professor Klump and Amanda pull Hoss into their flying machine scheme. The ""Hoss-mobile""doesn't seem to be destined for a great take-off.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben's friend, Don Miguel, visits the Ponderosa with his two daughters, Margarita and Elena, and Elena's two very anxious suitors. Their mission? They're on their way to California to meet Margarita's suitor, Don Luis.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Kellie Conrad dances and her father plays the fiddle to earn a living. Hoss feels a sense of guilt after he unintentionally hurts the arm that Kellie's father uses to play the fiddle, in a saloon fight with some roughnecks.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss' latest acquaintance, an Englishman named Professor Poppy, is actually Percival Alexander Mundy, M.D., who has given up the practice of medicine. However, when Hoss is shot in the back, only Mundy's skill can save his life.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam becomes involved with a quick-triggered range detective hired by the Virginia City Cattleman's Association to find out who is responsible for all the rustling going on in the area.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam sets out to track down the man who has been impersonating him to clear his reputation.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While working as a substitute teacher, Adam uncovers an ugly secret about the territory's past that others prefer remain hidden.

programme.desc: Determined to rescue Sakura, Sarada pursues Shin with Sasuke, Naruto, and Cho-Cho.

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Es Reagan contra Reagan cuando Danny va en contra de la orden directa de Jamie durante una negociación de rehenes.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Mientras estaba fuera de servicio, Danny se encuentra con un robo en una gasolinera y se ve obligado a usar su arma, dejándolo conmovido y su familia y compañeros de trabajo preocupados.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es asesinada en su apartamento, Danny y Báez recurren a su hija, Margo, para pedir ayuda, pero en cambio ella complica la investigación.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de un asesino en serie es ejecutado en Oklahoma, un imitador aparece y los agentes del FBI son llamados para encontrarlo. Al mismo tiempo, Prentiss se pone nerviosa pensando en una importante compra inmobiliaria.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC presenta uno de los casos más longevos de un asesino en serie a unos estudiantes universitarios, y llevan la clase a través de los 20 años en los que persiguieron al asesino.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una banda de ladrones de bancos inicia su último robo en un banco de Washington D.C., la UAC intenta negociar los rehenes con los ladrones, pero las apuestas comienzan a elevarse cuando uno de los suyos se convierte en rehén.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras la UAC continua persiguiendo a los ladrones, el equipo determina que los sospechosos tienen un objetivo más grande en D.C., y con uno del equipo como rehén, tienen que trabajar rápidamente para desactivar una situación explosiva.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Cuando Gibbs acepta ayudar a la amiga de la infancia de su hija, quien murió hace 15 años, se encuentra en el centro de un viaje emotivo e introspectivo a su pasado, llevando a una impactante y dolorosa conclusión.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la muerte de un almirante de la Marina, la cual toma un giro inesperado y emotivo cuando se encuentran con una mujer buscando a su marido desaparecido, un refugiado político africano.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS cuida a un niño de nueve años cuyo padre es buscado por un caso de asesinato sin resolver.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS paga un alto precio cuando intentan localizar a un marino que cree que aún se encuentra en Irak.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Un médium se acerca a Danny y Baez, afirmando saber qué le pasó a una mujer que fue encontrada muerta de un aparente suicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Es Reagan contra Reagan cuando Danny va en contra de la orden directa de Jamie durante una negociación de rehenes.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist on a call regarding a fight at a local residence. On a felony stop a juvenile male with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect sends police on a high-speed chase, a wanted man attempts to flee from officers on a bicycle, and security cameras catch a man trying to conceal items in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A brokenhearted man sends deputies on a dangerous pursuit through town, officers uncover a weapon during a traffic stop, and a woman is detained for driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to bargain with officers from a rooftop, a nightclub manager confronts the employee who stole his cash, and a talkative man insists he meant to get arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing driver becomes cooperative once he reaches his destination, a woman gets feisty with police, and police respond to a domestic dispute involving a frying pan.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bicycle chase leads to a bizarre reunion between an officer and suspect, police respond to a domestic dispute, and officers respond to a suspicious vehicle in a local park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a sting using a decoy vehicle. A man with a knife flees the scene of a dispute with his baby mama. Deputies are dispatched when a man is assaulted with a shovel over twenty dollars.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bicyclist with a warrant pedals into the desert to avoid Deputies. Surveillance cameras identify suspects in a beer run. A man in love struggles with his girlfriend's addictive behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When one of the officers attempts to grab a suspect, the suspect unexpectedly assaults the officer in an attempt to avoid arrest. An officer responds to a stabbing. An officer is flagged down by a concerned group looking for a missing child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lengthy pursuit in Independence, MO goes off-road. Deputies chase a motorcyclist who claims he ran because he doesn't have a motorcycle endorsement. A man ingests fentanyl during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A passenger flees during a traffic stop, deputies respond to a heated dispute between roommates, and an officer encounters an armed suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An underaged spring breaker is caught with a 'blackout rage gallon' and issued a ticket. A zero-tolerance policy of no alcohol or glass containers on the beach is enforced in Pinellas County.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a truck discovers what happens when you don’t lock your door. Police level with a troubled man and implore him to make better choices. An officer acts as a therapist for multiple people and their relationships.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Heavy rains in Vegas wash up a body in the storm drains. As the team investigates, they find bones in the sewer system that could only be murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted from outside a convenience store, triggering an Amber alert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a hotel suite with symptoms of the ebola virus.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a woman after a swap party where the married couples in the neighborhood meet and switch partners.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is called to a murder of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. The entire team gets involved when its discovered that a kidnapping took place along with the murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The killer from The Execution of Catherine Willows returns with deadly results.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who was pulled over by the police is found murdered two miles up the road from the stop. It's not long before Robbins determines that the woman is, genetically speaking, not a woman.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is confronted with new evidence while on the stand of a murder trial of a restaurant owner.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate the starving death of a five-year-old boy. They discover the boy has siblings who are in danger too.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick, and Nick find the body of two women at a construction site buried under tar. The swing shift is brought into the world of foreign mail-order brides.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Dos parejas se encuentran en un bar y una de ellas es asesinada. Cuando una segunda pareja es asesinada de forma similar, el equipo sospecha que una pareja de asesinos en serie anda suelta.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Cuando los principales sospechosos del caso del asesino en serie de Grissom son asesinados, Grissom sospecha que se trata de un trabajo desde dentro.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Grissom y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una anciana encontrada momificada en su armario. Sara y Nick llegan a investigar un allanamiento de morada para encontrar a una adolescente violada.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: Durante la última ola de calor de Las Vegas, con temperaturas de tres dígitos, Gil y Catherine investigan a un bebé encerrado en un coche.

programme.title: CSI en español
programme.desc: El equipo se introduce en el lado Furry de Las Vegas cuando un hombre es encontrado muerto a un lado de la carretera, vestido con un traje de mapache.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Natalia's ex-husband is murdered, evidence suggests that she killed him. Many people had a motive to kill Nick. Horatio and the CSIs investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Det. Frank Tripp's life hangs in the balance when he steps on a land mine while investigating a crime scene. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a truck full of confiscated weapons is hijacked and the weapons are released back into the public, Horatio links the crime to Clavo Cruz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A member of the team is pronounced dead after being shot in the head. Not wanting to give up, Horatio has the CSI rushed to the hospital.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must investigate when the parents of a baby sitter in an upscale neighborhood are brutally murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hunting weekend turns deadly when someone in the group is mauled by a bear and evidence suggests foul play. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate developer is killed, Horatio and the CSI team suspect his wife and her two secret twin sisters.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio suspects that the County Supervisor and the owners of a nearby Native American Casino may be involved when a murder victim is found scalped.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team investigate a movie star's death while he was in a celebrity rehab center and on the verge of exposing some damaging secrets.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A nasty divorce gets even worse when the husband's mistress turns up dead and, as the body count increases, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio investigates a case of revenge on a scorned ex-lover. A CSI's personal problems taint the investigation and Horatio is forced to fire them.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After a suspected carjacker is murdered, the CSIs learn that the victim may have been involved in drug smuggling off the shores of Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A serial killer suspected of killing young women and branding them with a 'Y' is caught and also identified as having the extra Y chromosome.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the murder of a probation officer, and Horatio learns that one of the suspects in the murder may be a son he didn’t know he had.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Un caso de asesinato que involucra cirugía plástica extrema conduce a Horatio Caine hasta Ron Saris, que está vivo y busca vengarse de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Cuando una estrella de telerrealidad es asesinada, Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se adentran en el mundo escandaloso y sensual de un programa de televisión de citas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI trabajan para averiguar por qué una familia aparentemente normal fue blanco de un brutal ataque con granadas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el caso de un hombre hervido vivo, Julia se descontrola y uno de los secretos más oscuros del equipo sale a la luz.

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español

programme.title: CSI: Miami en español

programme.desc: Una jovencita apareció muerta junto a su novio en un motel de paso. Por otro lado, Yolanda tiene problemas con su esposo y contrata los servicios de una cocinera para provocarlo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Eduardo tiene una casa, en su país, que alquilaba a sus hermanos; estos vendieron la propiedad varias veces. También, Ulises tiene una cafetería que está a punto de quebrar por su hijo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Elena se enamoró de Alfredo, quien dice que ella confundió la abrazoterapia con amor. En otro caso, Briannet y Cristian le compraron una casa a Griselda, pero había un cadáver en el patio.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)
programme.desc: Elizabeth quiere divorciarse porque Pedro se viste de mujer desde que murió su hermano gay. También, Alfonso cumplió prisión acusado de abusos a su hija, la niña inventó todo.

programme.desc: Los padres de Scarlett se han casado y divorciado durante cincuenta años. Además, Irene fue despedida porque se burló de los mexicanos y la fe que tienen en la Virgen de Guadalupe.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado (LAS)

programme.desc: Después de una ruptura amorosa y una serie de conquistas insatisfactorias, un hombre hace una promesa de no tener relaciones sexuales durante 40 días y 40 noches. Josh Hartnett y Shannyn Sossamon protagonizan esta sátira.

programme.title: Escobar: paraíso perdido
programme.desc: Nick, un joven surfista, cree que todos sus sueños se han hecho realidad cuando va a Colombia a visitar a su hermano. Nick se enamora perdidamente de la bella María. Todo parece perfecto hasta que Nick conoce al tío de la joven, un tal Pablo Escobar.

programme.title: Mátalos suavemente
programme.desc: Durante la crisis económica de 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), un sicario, es contratado para restablecer el orden después de que tres idiotas roban una partida de póquer protegida por la mafia.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Alto impacto

programme.title: No es otra tonta película de comida

programme.desc: Los dos hermanos sin suerte Lars y Ernie Smuntz no aprecian la vieja mansión en ruinas que heredaron, hasta que descubren que la propiedad vale millones.

programme.title: Adventureland: Un verano memorable

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: El Infierno
programme.desc: Benny es deportado de Estados Unidos a un México desgarrado por la guerra entre cárteles del narcotráfico. Se involucra en el negocio narco y asciende rápidamente, rodeado de dinero, mujeres, violencia y excesos.

programme.title: Purasangre

programme.desc: La joven Jessica encuentra un reno herido en el bosque nevado. Creyendo que es el verdadero Prancer, promete curarlo para devolvérselo a Papá Noel, y su empeño cambiará mágicamente la vida de toda la gente a su alrededor.

programme.title: El regalo de Navidad
programme.desc: Una periodista decide escribir un artículo navideño sobre su búsqueda de un “Amigo Secreto” de su infancia, cuyo regalo anónimo tuvo un gran impacto en su vida.

programme.title: Todo Gira Alrededor de la Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer debe elegir entre un trabajo de Nochebuena o unas vacaciones con su novio.

programme.title: Jesús, el niño Dios
programme.desc: En Belén nace Jesús, el salvador enviado por Dios, pero el rey Herodes dispone que mueran todos los menores de tres años. Un ángel avisa a José para que se refugie con su familia en Egipto y un legionario conduce a la familia por el desierto.

programme.title: The Alamo
programme.desc: John Wayne produces, directs and stars in this retelling of the Alamo, a battle in which 185 men joined together against an army of 7,000. Filmed entirely in Texas, "The Alamo" is a visually stunning and historically accurate celebration of courage.

programme.title: Fort Massacre
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: The Unforgiven
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: The King And Four Queens
programme.desc: Clark Gable is a smooth as ever in this unique blend of action, comedy and western intrigue as he romances the stunning Eleanor Parker -- and three other women -- in the hopes that one of them knows the location of a hidden cache of stolen gold.

programme.title: Man From Del Rio
programme.desc: When a Mexican gunslinger rids a town of several notorious gunfighters, he is named the sheriff, but must win over the rest of the residents who are yet to warm to his hard-hitting ways.

programme.title: Two For The Seesaw
programme.desc: Robert Wise directs Robert Mitchum and Shirley MacLaine in this spicy and poignant love story about a free-spirited Greenwich Village girl who hooks up with a brooding Nebraska lawyer.

programme.title: Irma La Douce
programme.desc: Set in Paris' famous Red Light district, a rookie policeman (Jack Lemmon) plots to keep a beautiful prostitute (Shirley MacLaine) all to himself in this hit comedy from director Billy Wilder.

programme.title: Sunset Boulevard (1950)

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: Witness for the Prosecution (1958)

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The farmers of Hooterville are headed to France! Or at least they are if they can get organized. As part of an agricultural exchange program, the farmers are offered a chance to join a chartered government flight to Europe.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Love is in the air as the first day of spring arrives in Hooterville. And who better to lead the town in celebrating it than Lisa. She is resolved to show Oliver just what spring is all about and sets out to produce a Spring festival celebration.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a hair-raising episode as Eb (Tom Lester) enrolls in a correspondence course to become a barber. Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Eddie Albert) give him the money to learn the trade but learning how to cut hair by mail has its glitches.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For a lawyer, Oliver should be more careful about what he signs. Lisa reminds him that two years ago Oliver made her a promise to take her back to New York for a two-week vacation. And she has it in writing… on the bottom of the kitchen drawer.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's hard to know who has a curse over Oliver, but he sure has his hands full with Lisa and her fellow Hungarian Lazlo Broslav. Lazlo appears with a letter claiming he once saved the life of Lisa's uncle, and now her family must repay the debt.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres goes Hollywood in this first installment of a two-part season finale. When Arnold the pig appears in a play at the Hooterville Theater, Lisa (Eva Gabor) arranges for an old friend to give Arnold a chance on the big screen.

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Old family conflicts resurface when Officer Luann Corbin's brother Tyler is released from prison and moves back home, driving a wedge between Luann, who thinks it’s a bad idea and that Tyler will never change, and her mother, who welcomes him.

programme.desc: Mike's support of hiring quotas faces a stern test when he is passed over for a promotion to a less-qualified black man. Mike confronts the hiring manager, but his big mouth gets him in trouble again.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is told by his doctor to go on a diet, or else he'll suffer serious health problems. He rejects the efforts of Edith, Mike and Gloria to stick with the diet, but Justin Quigley may provide the inspiration Archie needs.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: With a lot of demands on Mike and Gloria's time - Joey needs a lot of care, and both of them working - the Stivics begin wondering when...or if they'll ever have time for each other.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama is appalled when she finds a girlie magazine under Bubba's bed while cleaning. When it's revealed that Naomi sold it to him, Iola, Mama, Aunt Effie, and Pearl form MOP (Mothers Opposing Pornography), and set out to boycott.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Attempting to raise money for a trip to Hawaii, Mama talks her way into working at the same burger joint where Bubba has recently been hired.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: An anonymous letter convinces Vinton that he's adopted, so he sets out to find his biological mother... on Mother's Day.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama is surprised to learn she was entered in the Grandma USA contest by Bubba. She is reluctant to compete but changes her mind when she finds out the grand prize is a dream kitchen, complete with a self-cleaning oven.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint's former Army sergeant comes to town on a recruiting trip and he and Vint go out for a night of beers. Taking some advice from the Sargent he enlists in the military after being dumped by his girlfriend, to Mama's dismay.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama's worldly cousin (Vicki Lawrence in a dual role) annoys Mama with her lifestyle and her never-ending stories. (Note: Dorothy Lyman does not appear in this episode.)

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Mama emerges as a contender in an arm-wrestling competition and goes up against a biker's equally tough mother.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Naomi's best friend Luann has just been divorced and Naomi wants to set her up with a friend of hers for a double date with her and Vint. When Luann's date cancels, Naomi suggests Bubba stand in, much to Mama's chagrin.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint announces he's been invited to join The Mystical Order of the Cobra, a local Men's club. Mama, not wanting Vint to make it in, sabotages him, leaving it up to her to save him from humiliation during the ceremony.

programme.title: Mama's Family

programme.title: Con el culo al aire

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Un rumor comienza en la escuela de que Daria fue atrapada teniendo relaciones sexuales con su novio, Tom. Los dos deben decidir si quieren consumar su relación.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Los Morgendorffer compran un nuevo refrigerador y la caja le trae a Daria recuerdos de una pelea que Jake y Helen tuvieron acerca de cuando ella era niña, lo que causa que Daria se moleste con ellos y se obsesione con esa caja.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: Daria Morgendorffer llega al suburbio de Lawndale junto a sus padres Helen, Jake y su hermana menor Quinn. En el primer día de clase en la preparatoria de Lawndale, ambas hermanas deberán tomar un examen psicológico.

programme.title: Daria

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Butters debe fingir su muerte, vestirse como una niña e infiltrarse en una fiesta de pijamas con el fin de obtener un dispositivo para ver el futuro, que Cartman está convencido de que las chicas tienen.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: La señora Garrison se percata de que aún siente algo por el señor Esclavo, pero él ha planeado casarse con su nuevo amor, el gran gay Al, así que decide hacer todo lo que sea posible para detener la ley que permite el matrimonio gay.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Stan acepta hacerse un test de personalidad que le ofrecen unos cienciólogos. Tras descubrirse que su 'nivel de alma' es sorprendentemente alto, Stan es reconocido como la reencarnación del fundador de la Iglesia de la Cienciología.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Hay una imagen milagrosa en South Park y muchos creyentes, incluyendo a Randy March, padre de Stan, acuden a buscar solución a sus problemas.

programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.desc: Luchando con nuevos medicamentos, Vinnie acepta quedarse y ver el pub Crow's Nest para Kath.

programme.desc: Los mejores momentos de tu vida tienen algo en común: Tus amigos estaban ahí para acompañarte. Todas las experiencias mejoran si es que hay un amigo para apoyarte, o reírse de ti si algo sale mal. Dale play.

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Adrian and her boyfriend Benjamin are back so she can share a cheating secret of her own! Is Benjamin her child's dad? Then, Heather returns for another DNA test to find out if Robert is the father! What will the paternity test results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Ashley found her own cousin's panties in her boyfriend Jeff's gym bag and photos of them in the club. Is he cheating on her? Then, will Brandy's cheating evidence prove her hunches right? Later, Patricia's best friend has a shocking secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Today it's all about Ashlee! Lucky refuses to believe that his son Dechonne is the father of Ashlee's baby. Dechonne doesn't know who to believe! Then, Ashlee thinks her neighbor Jason is the father, but Jason's sister says she's wrong!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Josh is furious that his girlfriend Kathryn may be cheating on him… with his brother! Shandi thinks her boyfriend is living a second life with a secret family. Will Nikita cancel her nuptials to Patrick after she watches the hidden camera video?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Demetrius promise to leave his wife for Ashley and their child? Is Corey's red-headed child his? Comonique is tired of Anthony denying that he fathered their special needs child. What will the DNA test results reveal?

programme.desc: Almeta must know why her best friend is so close with her fiancé. Brandon must convince his fiancée and mom that he's no cheater! Jennell canceled her wedding because she thinks her fiancé is unfaithful, but her sister has a shocking secret!

programme.title: The Maury Show

programme.desc: Billy is convinced that Heather is having a secret affair with her best friend Tara. Then, Jennifer found a shocking message on Facebook about her husband Skky. What happens when she sees what Maury caught on tape while Skky was in the green room!

programme.desc: A woman continues searching for answers after the investigation into her daughter's murder goes cold.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Vegas Baby!
programme.desc: It's time to see who can handle Bret's rock star life on the road, so the final four girls take the tour bus heading to Vegas where Bret has a big show.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: Only three girls are left in the house and now it's time for their parents to meet Bret.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Rose & the Thorn
programme.desc: Things heat up when Bret tells the final 2 girls to pack their bikinis ‘cause they're goin' for an exotic getaway to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Clip Show
programme.desc: In this 30 minute special episode, Bret hosts a look back at hilarious, never-before-seen moments with our favorite girls from the series.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Reunion
programme.desc: Bret has gathered all of his ladies for one more wild night while two of the girls reveal that they moved in together and share the same bed.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Back to the Rocking Horse
programme.desc: Twenty more beautiful babes vie for his love and affection. Some bare more than their souls in an attempt to grab Bret's attention.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Peep Show
programme.desc: In the first ever Peep Show Contest, the girls all compete for a date with Bret by showing off their greatest “talents.”

programme.title: Rock of Love: Stroller Derby
programme.desc: But things turn ugly when the most hated girl in the house gets alone time with Bret – the fangs come out and the girls are out for blood!

programme.title: Rock of Love: A Ride on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Bret wants a girl with good manual skills so he tests their aptitude with nuts and bolts in a custom motorcycle build off.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Mud Bowl II
programme.desc: The “Divine Nine” compete in the second annual Bret Michaels Mud Bowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Once a Cowgirl
programme.desc: For the two women who have yet to win a date with Bret, Rodeo's Rocking Rodeo could be their last chance to make a connection.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Red, White and a Little Blue
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls display their ability to rock an audience as they perform at a USO show for military veterans.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Video Vixens
programme.desc: With only six girls left in the house, tensions run high as Bret tests the girls' creativity by making them shoot, direct and edit their own music videos.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Going to Ex-tremes
programme.desc: Bret shocks the girls by inviting their exes. He takes the guys out on the town to dig up dirt on the girls.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya has someone on her mind, and is questioning the house rules Mrs. Matlin has set.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Prom is fast approaching, but Clare is MIA from committee meetings.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig is hesitant to let Maya see his new place.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Vince has taken Zig in and treated him like family, but his actions have put Zig, and now even Maya, in harm’s way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s prom time at Degrassi and in a last-minute shot to save his night, Drew plans an elaborate prom-posal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew agrees to help Dallas salvage Prom and is punished.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The investigation of a country star's murder revolves around a driven TV producer (Barbara Mandrell) and her daughter, a timid songwriter.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist murders his estranged wife and frames a patient for the crime.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A sultry but sinister pharmaceutical rep is dead set on winning the heart of the hospital's chief of staff.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A beach boy involved with a gang member's sister is a suspect in his murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A surgeon (Wayne Rogers) drops dead while he's operating on another doctor (Jack Klugman).

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A pilot of an airliner carrying Dr. Sloan and Amanda to a medical conference in Europe is murdered.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A wealthy woman and her lover concoct an elaborate scheme to do in her husband.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A comedian (Tim Conway) makes a bumbling attempt to do in his more successful former partner (Harvey Korman)---whose wife turns up dead.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A mad bomber whom Dr. Sloan helped put away has escaped and wants the good doctor blown away.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve becomes embroiled in political intrigue after the murder of a city councilman's wife appears to be part of a larger political strategy.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangaea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved, and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the Hyaenodon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: The lives of cavemen were nasty, brutish and short, but somehow they evolved over 3.5 million years into Homo sapiens.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: Two very different species compete for survival in Africa 2,000,000 years ago.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Discover the beasts of the Ice Age with Professor Alice Roberts. Alice's adventure begins in the Land of the Sabre-tooth.

programme.title: Ice Age Giants
programme.desc: Alice ventures to the parts of the Northern Hemisphere hit the hardest by the cold - Europe and Siberia. High in the mountains of Transylvania, a cave sealed for thousands of years reveals grisly evidence of a fight to the death.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Maltese tries to bite and attack people; a spoiled Pomeranian; a Rottweiler vents his aggression on shopping carts.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A follow-up on the Hurricane Katrina dogs Cesar took; a German shepherd mix is difficult to walk; a chocolate lab refuses to walk on her family's new hardwood floors.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog develops an aggression problem after moving to a new area; a big dog does not let people near her owner; a beagle sniffs continually.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dog becomes aggressive when he sees other dogs; a Newfoundland does not eat; a dog runs out of the house whenever the door opens.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps an adopted terrier mix overcome her terrible fear of men and attempts to solve a pit bull's unhealthy fascination with chewing on rocks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A beagle has a chewing problem; three German shepherds must be kept apart; a bichon frisé dislikes her owner.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkie attacks his leash, plants and a fellow Yorkie; a bull terrier attacks larger dogs; a Jack Russell terrier/Italian greyhound mix barks constantly while her owner is at work.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.desc: An unpredictably aggressive Kerry blue terrier; two territorial Maltese dogs who are close to being banned from the retirement home where they live; a bloodhound/Catahoula mix who attacks her canine companion.

programme.desc: A golden retriever mix with canine aggression; a bearded collie who barks, howls and scratches at her owner's boyfriend's guitar; a Lhasa apso/Cavalier King Charles Spaniel with canine aggression.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog discovers today's prey is a notorious ladies man, he knows just how to lure him in. The trap includes a suggestive phone call, a motel rendezvous, and a crew of bounty hunters waiting in the next room ready to break up the party!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog leads the team on another adrenaline-filled chase in Denver. The fugitive, Robert, has a habit of address-hopping that makes him a difficult target, but Dog refuses to give up and finally tracks Robert down in his latest hideaway.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: This fugitive is hard to pin down in Honolulu's downtown district, moving from hostel to hotel to apartment high-rise. But as the hunt evolves, Dog discovers that this alleged burglar isn't the only family member wanted by the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides it's time to outfit the Da Kine crew with new SUVs. After a quick visit to their local dealership, they go after Jasmine, a woman whose criminal record includes over 37 arrests for everything from drug promotion to assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With Duane Lee back on the team, the rift in the Chapman clan appears over. But will time heal this wound? As the family heads out for the seedier side of Honolulu in search of an erotic dancer, we will find out if the wound is truly healed.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth are off to the Big Island for their wedding. They hope to relax for a few days but it turns out Leland has a fugitive he needs to catch and despite the time limit, neither Dog nor Beth can resist the opportunity to catch a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While the team tries to handle the bond that newcomer Alysin wrote incorrectly, sparks are flying between Beth and Duane Lee when he questions Beth's decision to go on the hunt without Dog leading the charge!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: They say you can't teach an old dog new tricks, but what if it's The Dog doing the teaching? Today's target is wanted on domestic abuse charges, but when Dog discovers she works for an escort service, he opts for a new twist on an old ruse.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for car theft, but she's nowhere to be found. Her girlfriend and co-signer has gone missing too. Just when the trail goes cold, a friend leads the team to the cosigner's empty apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is going to be the keynote speaker at the annual Profession Bail Agents convention in Las Vegas, but before he leaves he's got to clear two cases from his docket--Heidi and Stephanie.

programme.desc: Dr. Mike matches medical skills with an elderly Chinese doctor and his 'grandson' to avert an epidemic.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean to dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle goes into premature labor and delivers a baby girl, who suffers from respiratory problems. She names the child Kristina after a friend who once saved her life. Claudia is uneasy when Steven accompanies Luke on a business trip.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning that he may be Amanda's father, Blake resolves to ask Amanda to take a blood test. Nicole tells Jeff there's a chance Peter DeVilbis may have been with another woman at the time of the crash.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake buys back his racehorse Allegre from owner Daniel Reece, who sends Krystle a gift. Furious, she demands to know how he dared approach her after what happened with her sister, Iris. Amanda learns she is Blake's daughter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle begins working with Daniel. Blake is adamantly opposed and exchanges harsh words with Reece. Dex is furious with Alexis for traveling to Sumatra to see Blake's father. Alexis learns from Amanda about Dex's experience with Daniel in Vietnam.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda spends the night with Prince Michael and then is heartsick to learn he is engaged. Dex persuades the Chinese delegation to use his company instead of Blake's for an important drilling job. Claudia finally accepts Adam's advances.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buy out her company but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.title: PokerStars Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: Reigning champion Chino Rheem returns to the Bahamas after four years to dominate the feature table on Day 2 of the $10,000 PCA Main Event.

programme.title: PokerStars Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: Reigning champion Chino Rheem continues to dominate the PCA Main Event while American professionals Maria Ho and Taylor Paur battle on the main stage for a share of the $8.6 million prize pool.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Tension mounts as the money bubble approaches in Monte Carlo's Main Event. With 159 players set to cash for at least €8,690, every decision matters. EPT legends Patrik Antonius and Davidi Kitai command the feature table.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The money bubble has burst, but for seasoned pro Ole Schemion-who has earned over $5 million in Monte Carlo alone-a minimum cash isn't enough. He faces a formidable challenge from French star Gaëlle Baumann and online legend Jussi Nevanlinna.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: PSPC champion Ramon Colillas surges into the top five as just 40 players remain in the EPT Monte Carlo Main Event. Day 3 intensifies as competitors battle to reach the final two tables.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The field narrows to just 16 survivors, including EPT Dublin champion Niall Farrell and PSPC winner Ramon Colillas. With over €41,000 already locked up, the stakes couldn't be higher as players fight for their place at the final table of nine.

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: Nine players remain, but only six will advance to the final day with a shot at nearly €1 million and poker immortality. Can PSPC champion Ramon Colillas extend his remarkable run to another major final table, or will his epic journey end?

programme.title: European Poker Tour
programme.desc: The moment of truth arrives at the EPT Monte Carlo final table. Six players-two businessmen, one qualifier, and three seasoned professionals-wage the ultimate battle for almost €1 million and the coveted EPT trophy.

programme.title: PokerStars Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: British professional Sam Grafton plays against poker legend Jason Mercier at the feature table as the final 127 players compete for a piece of the $8.6 million PCA Main Event prize pool.

programme.title: Coaches' Corner

programme.title: PokerStars Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: The $10k PCA Main Event is in the money and the field is still filled with talent; as day three continues, the feature table is headlined by high stakes regulars Mustapha Kanit and Chance Kornuth and EPT winner Anton Wigg.

programme.title: PokerStars Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: It's day four of the PCA Main Event, a $10k tournament with an $8.6m prize pool; big stacks Sergi Reixach and Chris Csik take centre stage, while PSPC champ Ramon Colillas aims to win his second major title in the Bahamas.

programme.title: PokerStars Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: In the Bahamas, the $10k PCA Main Event is playing down to the final two tables; Ramon Colillas and Noah Boeken are among the pros still in the running for the trophy and $1.5m first prize.

programme.title: PokerStars Caribbean Adventure
programme.desc: Just 16 players remain from almost a thousand entries at the PCA Main Event; American Pro, Jonathan Little hopes to use his experience to make the Final Table and take a shot at the $1.5m first prize.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer tries to incinerate everything that could link him to his crime. But in doing so, he inadvertently creates new forensic evidence. Detectives employ a technique never before used in a criminal investigation to bring it to light.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a nightmare when a woman is found face-down in a lake.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Professional photographer Charles Rathbun claims model Linda Sobek died during a consensual sexual encounter gone wrong, but Sobek's corpse and digital imaging tell a more sinister story.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
